situationBrief: **13 exceptions are active across your South Texas zone**, up from 8 at last shift close. The highest-priority cluster is **three customs holds at the Laredo World Trade Bridge** tied to Gold-tier orders, with the tightest breach window closing in **3 hours 40 minutes**. SignalTrack dropped tracking on **two refrigerated loads** in the past hour, so cold-chain status on those is **inferred, not confirmed**. OrderPulse has been silent for 42 minutes, so customer-tier data on the newest orders may be lagging.

sourceHealth.detail: GPS pings delayed 8 to 15 min on carrier feed
No events received in 42 min, last sync 06:58 CT

exceptions.headline: Customs hold at Laredo, missing commercial invoice
exceptions.description: Load is held at the **Laredo World Trade Bridge** pending a corrected commercial invoice. **Two Gold-tier customer orders** are attached, and the SLA breach window closes in **3 hours 40 minutes**. BorderIQ flags the reason as **Documentation Gap**, the most common resolvable category, and OrderPulse confirms both orders are Gold-tier.

exceptions.headline: Customs hold at Laredo, sanctions screening flag
exceptions.description: A consignee name **partially matched a sanctions watchlist** entry during automated screening at the Laredo World Trade Bridge. **This needs manual legal clearance** before the load can proceed. Filing is otherwise complete, so there is no documentation gap to work.

exceptions.headline: Cold-chain reefer silent for 46 minutes
exceptions.description: SignalTrack has not received a telematics ping from this reefer in **46 minutes**, past the 30-minute silent-period threshold, on the run into the Laredo Cross-Dock. Cold-chain condition is currently **inferred** from the last confirmed reading, not live data, because the SignalTrack feed is degraded.
exceptions.epistemicBasis: Inferred from last confirmed reading at 13:44 CT plus lane transit model

exceptions.headline: Inbound dock queue backed up at San Antonio Hub
exceptions.description: Nexus WMS shows **7 trailers** waiting at the San Antonio Distribution Hub inbound doors, average wait now **2 hours 10 minutes**. Two of the waiting loads carry **time-sensitive produce** moving up from the valley.
exceptions.epistemicBasis: Nexus WMS dock schedule, synced 14:15 CT

exceptions.headline: ETA deviation beyond threshold, I-35 lane
exceptions.description: SignalTrack projects arrival **2 hours 15 minutes** past the committed window into New Braunfels, based on current speed and remaining distance on the I-35 lane. No stop or detour reported yet.
exceptions.epistemicBasis: ETA model using live GPS speed and remaining route distance

exceptions.headline: Second Redline load running late on I-35, linked to SHP-50410
exceptions.description: **Same lane, carrier, and dispatcher** as SHP-50410, projected **1 hour 50 minutes** late into New Braunfels. Both loads share a dispatcher, so **a single call likely resolves both**.
exceptions.epistemicBasis: ETA model using live GPS speed and remaining route distance

exceptions.headline: Short shipment, ASN mismatch at McAllen
exceptions.description: Received quantity is **12 units short** of the advance ship notice at the McAllen Foreign-Trade Zone. The gap was logged during putaway scan and is **not yet reconciled** with the supplier.
exceptions.epistemicBasis: Nexus WMS receiving event, scanned 11:20 CT

exceptions.headline: Driver reported flat trailer tire, I-35 roadside
exceptions.description: Filed manually by dispatch. Driver is stopped near the **Cotulla relay point on I-35** waiting on roadside assistance. **No telematics feed** is attached to this shipment yet, so **location is approximate** and not confirmed.
exceptions.epistemicBasis: Manually filed ticket, no source-system corroboration yet

exceptions.headline: Prohibited goods alert at Pharr, escalated to compliance
exceptions.description: BorderIQ flagged a line item as a **potential prohibited-goods match** at the Pharr-Reynosa Border DC. Escalated to the compliance desk **38 minutes ago** and still awaiting a ruling. The load carries a **Gold-tier commitment due today**.

exceptions.headline: Carrier gone silent, 3 hours no response
exceptions.description: Atlas Transit has not responded to tender confirmation requests in **3 hours** on a Corpus Christi Port outbound. FleetCommand TMS marks the booking as **unconfirmed**. Escalated by the routing team pending a **backup carrier decision**.
exceptions.epistemicBasis: FleetCommand TMS tender log, last contact 11:30 CT

exceptions.headline: Inventory count variance, escalated to site lead
exceptions.description: Cycle count at the San Antonio Southeast DC shows a **340-unit variance** against the WMS ledger for a fast-moving SKU. Escalated pending a **physical recount** before the next outbound wave.
exceptions.epistemicBasis: Nexus WMS cycle count, reconciled 09:10 CT

exceptions.headline: Outbound dock delay, delegated to San Antonio lead
exceptions.description: Delegated to the site operations lead this morning. Outbound loading at the San Antonio Distribution Hub is running **55 minutes behind** schedule due to a **labor shortfall on second shift**.
exceptions.epistemicBasis: Nexus WMS dock schedule, synced 13:05 CT

exceptions.headline: Customer requested delivery reschedule
exceptions.description: Filed manually after a customer call requesting a **later delivery window** on an Eagle Pass crossing load. Delegated to the customer success team to **confirm the new appointment**.
exceptions.epistemicBasis: Manually filed ticket, awaiting OrderPulse appointment confirmation

exceptions.headline: Minor document correction, delegated to broker
exceptions.description: A **HS code typo** was found during BorderIQ's automated review on an Eagle Pass crossing. Classified as a **Documentation Gap** and delegated to the customs broker for a **routine amendment**, with no compliance risk.
